commands.repair_reason: Manual review is required because the remaining blockers are rebase/conflict handling, real workflow proof, and maintainer approval of a secret-bearing shared desktop workflow rather than a narrow code repair.; Needs attention: Needs attention because the diff adds a shared-secret desktop lease workflow whose boundary and redaction behavior need live proof and maintainer approval. (sha=eb024d63e368ccf6ede2127319e535d5ea29ac9c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Crabbox PR desktop lease GitHub Actions workflow, the lease lifecycle script, docs/navigation, changelog text, and focused workflow/script regression tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this PR adds a new maintainer automation lane. Source review and targeted tests cover the intended path, but successful live workflow proof is still missing.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is required because the remaining blockers are rebase/conflict handling, real workflow proof, and maintainer approval of a secret-bearing shared desktop workflow rather than a narrow code repair.

target.title: feat(crabbox): add PR desktop lease workflow
target.body:
## Summary
- add a generic Crabbox PR desktop lease workflow for maintainer-triggered Linux and macOS inspection leases
- install a pinned Crabbox CLI from `openclaw/crabbox` before leasing
- post ready/status/failure handoff comments back to the target PR without exposing WebVNC credentials
- harden lease lifecycle around stale heads, inspect failures, terminal states, duplicate creation, WebVNC bridge recovery, and PR-head race windows
- document the first-run/default-branch proof constraint for this secret-bearing workflow

## Validation
- `node --check scripts/crabbox/pr-desktop-lease.mjs`
- `node scripts/check-workflows.mjs`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check`
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/crabbox-pr-desktop-leases.md docs/docs.json`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/crabbox-pr-desktop-lease.test.ts test/scripts/crabbox-pr-desktop-lease-workflow.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts` - 108 tests passed
- `autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean before the last two race/expiry fixes; reruns after those fixes stalled in the review engine, so the two findings were fixed manually and covered with targeted tests

## Proof status
- Not ready to undraft or merge yet unless maintainers waive the live mac proof requirement.
- This is a generic Crabbox desktop lease workflow. Mantis is not required for this PR; any Mantis capture would only be optional QA evidence.
- No Mantis-prefixed secret fallbacks remain, and this branch no longer changes Mantis docs.
- GitHub cannot manually dispatch a new workflow until it exists on the default branch, so first-run workflow proof still needs a trusted default-branch deployment or an operator machine.
- 2026-05-23 operator-machine retry used GitHub-backed Crabbox auth successfully: `crabbox whoami` reported `auth=github`, and `crabbox doctor --provider aws --target macos` passed.
- The mac proof partially ran: lease `cbx_5f9caf35214b` allocated for `eb024d63e368`, VNC became reachable, but WebVNC portal bridge stayed `connected=false`; `webvnc reset` hung in SSH tunnel setup while the lease still reported `ready=false`. The lease was released and the local daemon was stopped.
- This PR is currently conflicting with `main`; rebase and rerun focused validation before any merge decision.
target.author: takhoffman

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: vincentkoc
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a shared moderation-transfer guard and tests/spec/changelog coverage for blocking direct, accepted, admin, reclaim, and publish-time skill ownership moves while a skill is moderated.

Reproducibility: yes. The PR-head unit job gives a high-confidence reproduction of the current blocker with `unexpected skillSlugAliases index by_skill`, and current-main source inspection shows the broader transfer paths lack the new moderation guard.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can update the failing ownership-heal test fixture; the remaining fail-closed policy should stay visible for maintainer review.
